positive: Stylized illustration of a mythical, friendly fox spirit sitting amongst stylized celestial flora and glowing runes. The fox should have a majestic, flowing tail and alert, intelligent eyes. The scene must incorporate geometric patterns and cosmic elements like nebulas and stylized constellations, designed for high contrast and clean silhouette printing. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, ethereal gold, sage green, and crisp white. Composition should be centered, maximizing negative space around the fox for apparel printing. Flat vector art mixed with detailed cosmic etching style, ultra-detailed, high saturation, clean lines, print-friendly.
negative: blurry, noisy, lowres, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, symbols, extra limbs, bad anatomy, bokeh, messy, cluttered, low detail, grayscale
